{ "name": "any-promise", "version": "1.3.0", "description": "Resolve any installed ES6 compatible promise", "main": "index.js", "typings": "index.d.ts", "browser": { "./register.js": "./register-shim.js" }, "scripts": { "test": "ava" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "https://github.com/kevinbeaty/any-promise" }, "keywords": [ "promise", "es6" ], "author": "Kevin Beaty", "license": "MIT", "bugs": { "url": "https://github.com/kevinbeaty/any-promise/issues" }, "homepage": "http://github.com/kevinbeaty/any-promise", "dependencies": {}, "devDependencies": { "ava": "^0.14.0", "bluebird": "^3.0.0", "es6-promise": "^3.0.0", "is-promise": "^2.0.0", "lie": "^3.0.0", "mocha": "^2.0.0", "native-promise-only": "^0.8.0", "phantomjs-prebuilt": "^2.0.0", "pinkie": "^2.0.0", "promise": "^7.0.0", "q": "^1.0.0", "rsvp": "^3.0.0", "vow": "^0.4.0", "when": "^3.0.0", "zuul": "^3.0.0" } }
